I was taught the wrong way to test blood with a finger stick. Pictured is the wrong way.

A fingertip has a bazillion nerves, for feeling things. Don't poke it. Pinch the side below the nail so the skin goes numb. It only takes a few seconds. Poke there. Painless. Don't damage fingertips.
🏆 -E 1/2
